purpose: Non-destructive text metadata audit for all ground-floor opening CAD text. Raw CAD text stays unchanged; display text and popup roles are derived for later UI/material use only.

rules: Raw CAD text is preserved and never overwritten by display normalization.
Popup/display labels can use display_text, but source traceability must keep source_entity_id and raw_text.
Numeric text remains blocked until exact CAD dimension line pairs are bound.
Context notes such as plinth, blue stone, rainwater pipe, gutter and level markers remain popup/source metadata, not opening geometry.
Opening component notes such as screen, vliegenraam, Invisivent, kleinhouten and vast are metadata until exact frame/glass/subpart geometry exists.
